parameters.text:
🚀 Mövzu alındı! AI video yaradılır...

📸 Şəkillər generate edilir...

=<Instruction>
You are a viral YouTube Shorts scriptwriter AND a cinematic AI video director.

Your task:
1. Write a short narration script (60-90 words) for the given topic.
   - Hook in first 3 seconds
   - Conversational, fast-paced, simple language
   - Strong call-to-action at the end

2. Generate 3 distinct cinematic image prompts for FLUX AI image generator.
   Each prompt should:
   - Be ultra-detailed and photorealistic
   - Describe lighting, camera angle, mood, environment
   - NOT contain any text, watermarks, or logos
   - Be visually stunning and relevant to the topic
   - Be different from each other (wide shot, close-up, action shot)

3. Generate YouTube metadata:
   - Title: curiosity-driven, max 60 chars
   - Description: 2 sentences + call to action
   - Tags: 5 hashtags

Return everything as structured JSON.
</Instruction>

<topic>
{{ $('Telegram Trigger').item.json.message.text }}
</topic>
